title: Restore ICMPv6 malformed source, length, and checksum validation in handle_icmpv6
description: Add explicit bounds checks for packet length, source address (no unspecified/multicast for echoes per RFC), checksum verification must precede all processing, drop malformed silently or with metrics. Update Icmpv6Message.from_bytes and verify_checksum. Reference RFC 4443 sections 2.3, 4.2.
